transition: 大過 Dà Guò (Great Exceeding) -> 剝 Bō (Splitting Apart)
verse_zh: 廓落失業，跨禍度福，利無所得。
verse_en: Vast and vacant, livelihood lost; straddling disaster, crossing toward fortune. Profit is nowhere to be found.
note: Wanders into a pleasant prosperous village -> tone is exactly backwards (verse is loss and emptiness).
prompt: Vast and vacant, livelihood lost; straddling disaster, crossing toward fortune. Profit is nowhere to be found. Chinese ink painting style.
